_publications._publicationTitle: A Fibroblast-Derived Secretome Stimulates the Growth and Invasiveness of 3D Plexiform Neurofibroma Spheroids.

_contextSnippet: sEV-depleted Fib-CM exhibited ~ a 94% reduction in sEVs in the range of 30~150 nm
details: Successfully detected ~94% reduction in small extracellular vesicles (30-150 nm range) after ultracentrifugation depletion
